sections.content: The right frame is already gone by history[40]. Let me check earlier to find when it disappeared.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check earlier history to find when the right frame disappeared
for i in range(30, 42):
    if i < len(history):
        seg_h = history[i].frame.segmentation
        has_right = False
        for n in seg_h['nodes']:
            if n['color'] in ['c', 'G'] and n['pixels'] == 12:
                b = n['boundary']
                if b[0][0] <= 24 and b[0][1] >= 44:
                    has_right = True
                    break
        print(f"History[{i}]: action={history[i].action}, has_right={has_right}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
